title: PR Writeup Example
subtitle: Prepare a concise PR handoff for reviewers.

sections.heading: PR Writeup in use
sections.body: This writeup is the artifact a reviewer should see after the gallery work lands: concise change scope, concrete validation, and visible risks.

cards.title: Changed
cards.body: Rebuilt the template fixture generator with content-rich examples for all gallery cards.

cards.title: Validated
cards.body: Renderer tests, static HTML checks, lint, typecheck, and browser click checks.

cards.title: Risk
cards.body: Trusted HTML examples are intentionally local and static; they must not become a path for user-supplied raw HTML.

sections.heading: PR body draft
sections.code:
## Summary
- Make vpk-html example gallery cards clickable
- Replace generic fixtures with template-specific demo content
- Align portable light tokens with VPK/ADS white surfaces

## Validation
- node --test .agents/skills/vpk-html/scripts/test-templates.test.js
- pnpm run lint
- pnpm run typecheck

sections.heading: Example data policy
sections.body: This demo uses invented project data so the template shape is visible without depending on private tickets, customer names, or live metrics.
